task: Write implementation plan for B3 (myapps task list) — Sonnet agents need this before they can build
report:
Plan written and PR opened: https://github.com/Duongntd/strawberry/pull/27

Key findings from codebase audit: TaskList is ~90% built already. Existing: WeekGrid, DayColumn, TaskCard, UndoToast, full Pinia store (CRUD + Firestore + localStorage + undo + carry-forward), router, Home card, Firestore rules.

Three gaps identified for Sonnet to complete:
1. Real-time onSnapshot listener (store currently uses one-time getDocs — Evelynn's changes won't appear without refresh)
2. Firestore index for _deleted + createdAt
3. E2E test (e2e/task-list.spec.ts)

Plan is at plans/proposed/2026-04-05-myapps-task-list.md with full data model, component map, exact file paths, code sketches, and 7 sequential steps. Ready for Evelynn to approve and delegate to Katarina or Ornn.
